AppSheet expression / configuration: CONCATENATE("https://wa.me/", SUBSTITUTE([BuyerID].[whatsapp], "+", ""), "?text=", ENCODEURL(CONCATENATE("Hola ", [BuyerID].[nombre], ", estas láminas suman $", TEXT([V_PublicarTotalLow]), ".
